items.title: Pump.fun activity craters 80% in three months, dragging Solana fees lower as traders rotate into perps
items.whyYouShouldCare: The significant drop in Pump.fun activity indicates reduced trading volume, which directly impacts Solana's transaction fees and overall liquidity.

items.title: SKYAI rockets 21% on Forward Industries takeover bid – Is a 126% rally ahead?
items.whyYouShouldCare: The surge in SKYAI's value suggests increased investor interest, which could influence broader market sentiment and potentially attract more users to Solana-based applications.

items.title: Forward Solana treasury stock jumps 8% as smaller DATs reject acquisition bids
items.whyYouShouldCare: The rise in Forward Solana treasury stock reflects investor confidence in the ecosystem, particularly as smaller decentralized autonomous tokens (DATs) resist acquisition offers.
